context: Tests whether the agent uses shared_examples for the repeated authorization behavior across three endpoints, uses travel_to for the time-dependent expiry assertions, and avoids let_it_be in a project without test-prof.

checklist.name: shared_examples defined
checklist.description: RSpec.shared_examples is used to define the shared subscription authorization behavior

checklist.name: shared_examples consumed twice or more
checklist.description: it_behaves_like or include_examples referencing the shared behavior is invoked at least twice — covering at least 2 of the 3 endpoints

checklist.name: travel_to used
checklist.description: travel_to is used in the subscription expiry spec to control the current time during assertions

checklist.name: Expiry true at >30 days
checklist.description: At least one example asserts that expired? returns true when activated_at is more than 30 days in the past

checklist.name: Expiry false at <30 days
checklist.description: At least one example asserts that expired? returns false when activated_at is fewer than 30 days in the past

checklist.name: let_it_be NOT used
checklist.description: let_it_be does NOT appear in any spec file (test-prof is not available in this project)

checklist.name: Shared examples in spec/support/
checklist.description: The shared_examples definition is in a file under spec/support/ rather than inline in an endpoint spec file

checklist.name: 403 response asserted in shared behavior
checklist.description: The shared examples include an assertion that a user without a subscription receives a 403 HTTP status

checklist.name: Model spec path correct
checklist.description: The subscription expiry spec is placed at spec/models/subscription_spec.rb (or equivalent mirrored path)
